prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次为约326→322→335→340→322名，整体波动较大，2025年回到322名与2022年持平，近3年波动区间约322–340名；该校在山西省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年41人、2022年41人、2023年41人、2024年42人、2025年60人；2026年计划43人，较2025年60人缩招17人（-28.3%） ，缩招幅度较大，竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科排名连续6年稳居第3名，全国顶尖高校层次，对理科高分考生吸引力极 强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，但浙大作为C9高校整体报考热度不减；抖音热度排名第14（高热），短视频平台关注度持续旺盛；浙大在理科相 关领域实力极强：计算机科学与技术A+、软件工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、光学工程A+、动力工程及工程热物理A+、机械工程A+、数学A+、临床医学A等，与招生专业高度匹配。\ n计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等浙大王牌专业持续高热推荐；本省2026年物理类考生约167,419人，较2025年173,347人减少约3.4%，考 生规模小幅缩减。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，非本省高校；该校在山西省理科招生占比约2%–3%，属外省招生中等水平，无明显地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年招生计划大幅缩招（-28.3%）与本省物理类考生小幅减少（-3.4%），缩招幅度远超考生减少幅度，竞争显著加剧；但浙大顶尖学科（计算机、电 子信息等）持续高热，报考热度不减；在2025年基准322名基础上，预计最低位次前移至约277名，区间243–311名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 326 → 322 → 335 → 340 → 322, showing overall significant fluctuation, returning to 322 in 2025, the same as 2022, with a fluctuation range of about 322–340 in the past 3 years; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shanxi Province: 41 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 42 in 2024, 60 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 43, a reduction of 17 (-28.3%) compared to 60 in 2025, a significant reduction, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 3rd in the Soft Science ranking for 6 consecutive years, a top national university level, strongly attracting high-scoring science candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but as a C9 university, overall application enthusiasm remains high; Douyin popularity ranking 14th (high heat), with sustained attention on short video platforms; Zhejiang University has extremely strong strength in science-related fields: Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Mathematics A+, Clinical Medicine A, etc., highly matching the enrollment majors.\ nComputer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine and other top majors of Zhejiang University continue to be highly recommended; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in this province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, a slight reduction in candidate scale.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, not a provincial university; its enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province for science is about 2%–3%, a moderate level for out-of-province enrollment, with no obvious regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-28.3%) and the slight decrease in physics category candidates in this province (-3.4%), the reduction in enrollment far exceeds the decrease in candidates, significantly intensifying competition; however, Zhejiang University's top disciplines (computer, electronic information, etc.) remain highly popular, with sustained application enthusiasm; based on the 2025 benchmark of 322, the minimum ranking is expected to move forward to about 277, with a range of 243–311.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 119 → 121 → 138 → 134 → 140, showing a gradual backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 21 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 140, a slight backward shift of 6 positions compared to 2024; the university's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province for liberal arts (history category): 23 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 24 in 2024, 32 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24, a significant reduction of 8 (-25%) compared to 32 in 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked 3rd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top tier of national universities, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and campus safety incidents, but as a top university, overall application enthusiasm remains high; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 14th (high heat), with sustained attention on short video platforms; Zhejiang University has over 30 A- or above disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Clinical Medicine A, Law A, Applied Economics A-, etc., with extremely strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among liberal arts-related majors, law is relatively popular, Chinese language and literature is recommended, while journalism and communication are clearly discouraged; in 2026, the number of history category candidates in this province is approximately 63,113, a decrease of about 25.6% compared to 84,879 in 2025, significantly reducing competition pressure; Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, not a local university; the university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province is about 2.5%–4.7%, which is a moderate level for out-of-province enrollment, with no obvious regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the gradual backward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment reduction (-25%) in 2026, and the substantial decrease in history category candidates in this province (-25.6%), the reduction and candidate decrease are roughly equivalent, but Zhejiang University's top status and sustained high attention make competition still tight; based on the 2025 baseline of 140, the minimum ranking is expected to move forward to approximately 114, with a range of 84–144.
